name: Italienne Corn Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the Italian herb seasoning, parsley, garlic salt, and Parmesan cheese to the melted butter. Mix well until smooth.
3. Keep the mixture warm while preparing the popcorn.
4. Pour the unpopped popcorn into a large serving bowl.
5. Stir in the seasoned butter mixture, then pour over the popcorn.
6. Toss lightly to ensure even coating.
7. Serve immediately. Makes 4 quarts.
